section.title: Exams
section.p:
This course has three in-class exams. The days and sections covered are:
Exam 1
Monday 1/27 or Tuesday 1/28 (depending on your section). This will cover sections 10.1 through 10.7.
Exam 2
Monday 2/17 or Tuesday 2/18 (depending on your section). This will cover sections 11.1 through 12.3. There may be some essential material from the first exam that appears again.
Exam 3
This will cover sections 12.4 through 13.7. There may be some essential material from the first two exams that appears again.
CRN Day Time
10501 Monday 3/17 11:00 (not 11:30!)
10626 Tuesday 3/18 9:00
11345 Wendesday 3/19 2:00
Check these times against your travel schedule right away to see if we need to make alternative arrangements. If you wait too long, you may lose the option to have an alternative arrangement.
